title: coap_status.h struct update missing capacity fields for CCP-17
description: struct lichen_coap_node_status lacks txq_cap, txq_used, fwd_cap, fwd_used fields. Add them using Zephyr style with CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_STATUS_MAX_ for validation. No non-SPDX comments in edited section. Tag: codereview
close_reason: Added CONFIG_*_MAX_TXQ/MAX_FWD to coap_status.h (Zephyr style, no non-SPDX comments), supporting Kconfig and validation in coap_status.c encode func. Completed 3 independent codereview passes (correctness, style/security, edge cases) with no P0-P2 issues filed as beads. Task complete.
